## Checklist

- [ ] **Changelog** — Updated What's New if this is a user-facing change
- [ ] **Home widgets** — Verified Home.tsx still renders correctly (if touching recipes, todos, shopping, or calendar data)
- [ ] **Settings** — Updated Settings.tsx if adding new config, toggles, or feature flags
- [ ] **API contract** — Frontend types and worker API stay in sync (if touching endpoints or response shapes)
- [ ] **Mobile** — Tested on mobile viewport / PWA
- [ ] **TypeScript** — `pnpm typecheck` passes locally
